story.title: Ozzie Beckford Oral History Part 2
story.description: In this interview, Ozzy Beckford shares his life journey, focusing on his work experiences across different states and his eventual settlement in Connecticut. He discusses his roles and challenges in various jobs, including positions in agriculture and his time at Loomis Chaffee School. Beckford provides insights into his family life, emphasizing the importance of providing for and protecting his family, including handling difficult situations such as schooling and transportation for his children. Highlights include his transition from various jobs to a fulfilling role at Loomis, his interactions with colleagues and community building, and his reflections on personal values and family relationships.
